description: Registered customers. First and last name stored separately.

chunks.text:
TABLE: customers

DESCRIPTION: Registered customers. First and last name stored separately.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: customers, buyers, users, shoppers, clients, registered users, account holders

PRIMARY_KEY: customer_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: none

COLUMNS: customer_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, address, city, state, zip_code, country, created_at

USE_CASES: Customer lookup, customer segmentation, contact info, order history by customer
